title: The Devil in Eva
wikitext:
[]: The Devil in Eva             Quote Post by Zeruel » Fri Mar 19, 2010 3:00 am In Evangelion in any medium released have they ever mentioned the devil or hell in a serious matter or in contex?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 19, 2010 3:03 am lolwut anyway, JSDF soldiers call Eva-01 devil in EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Zeruel » Fri Mar 19, 2010 3:12 am Satan whatever you wanna call him, I'm just curious with all the other biblical references in the anime with angels, god, and humans I wonder if they ever mentioned Satan.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Mar 19, 2010 3:31 am There is no God, Satan, Heaven, or Hell anywhere in Evangelion. The Angels' origins are kept ambiguous in the series, but they are not intended to represent beings come down from Heaven or any such thing. If you really must have a more concrete answer on what the Angels are and where they came from, see the "Classified Information" from the Eva2 game. There's a full translation of it here . The sections "Angel," "Adam," "Lilith," and "First Ancestral Race" are good places to start.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Fri Mar 19, 2010 9:16 am There is an angel named Iblis in a paper RPG of sorts and that is the Islam name for Lucifer.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 19, 2010 10:09 am At the very beginning of the OP there is a stylized depiction of a 12-winged angel (seraphim) that some have suggested would be a depiction of Sammael, one of many possible fallen angels identified as "The Devil"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 19, 2010 10:30 am I always thought Asuka was supposed to represent the Devil.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 19, 2010 10:56 am If someone could be a personification of the Devil in Neon Genesis Evangelion, it would be SEELE. They are both proud and rebel against their maker, thinking their way of things is rightful and superior.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 19, 2010 12:03 pm Related http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6163 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=780

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Mar 19, 2010 12:27 pm esselfortium wrote: There is no God, Satan, Heaven, or Hell anywhere in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Mar 19, 2010 2:35 pm At least on a simbolic level unit 01 seems to be in the role of the devil in the eva universe.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 19, 2010 3:33 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: Also I don't see any proof if First Ancestral Race is god or not.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Mar 19, 2010 8:33 pm esselfortium wrote: There is no God, Satan, Heaven, or Hell anywhere in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Mar 19, 2010 11:24 pm esselfortium wrote: There is no God, Satan, Heaven, or Hell anywhere in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:28 am BrikHaus wrote: But I thought that God's in his heaven and all's right with the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:37 am There's no hell in the Evaverse. Just egf.

[]: Re: The Devil in Eva             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:57 am Zeruel wrote: In Evangelion in any medium released have they ever mentioned the devil or hell in a serious matter or in contex?

[]: Re: The Devil in Eva             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 2:35 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: No sir, they do not.

[]: Re: The Devil in Eva             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 5:42 pm Reichu wrote: The JSSDF dude sounded pretty serious. And Fuyutsuki compared the South Pole to Hell.

[]: Re: The Devil in Eva             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:20 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: But they never directly refer to the devil, they call Unit-01 that, but that was of course it's nickname, remeber episode one.
